commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Morning. Those who were spared pretended to repent. (Haydock)
Afflictions are the source of much good. But the Israelites are blamed for their inconstancy and deceit. (Calmet)
They came with apparent earnestness (Haydock) to offer the morning sacrifice (Worthington) under affliction. (Menochius)
